description: This understated bow-detailed pair will charm you out of your haughty stilettos! Parade your girly appeal this summer with pastel shades and this pair of sandals for a sophisticated finish. Heel: 3"UpperForefoot straps featuring a bow detail on topPadded footbed with a brand patch at the heelOutsoleTPU outsole with a heel patchSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
